description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a distressed, weathered blue-gray finish, giving it a rustic and aged appearance. The front features five open shelves, each evenly spaced and slightly recessed, suitable for storing or displaying items. The top of the unit is flat and slightly overhangs the sides, providing a small additional surface. The sides and back are solid, with the back panel appearing to be made of a different, brown-toned wood material, further emphasizing its vintage look. The surface shows signs of wear, with patches of discoloration and faded paint, suggesting long-term use or exposure to the elements. This piece would be well-suited for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor covered areas where robust, utilitarian storage is needed.
description: A tall, weathered blue-gray shelving unit with five open shelves and a flat overhanging top, featuring a rustic, distressed finish and a brown wooden back panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the unit, the distressed blue-gray finish, and the overhanging top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying five open shelves and the full width of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same blue-gray finish and the overhanging top, with the brown back panel partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid brown wooden back panel and the base of the unit.
